case_title: TED OLSSON et al VS. ALI KHOSTOVAN

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF OLSSON, TED OLSSON, ASTRID AS TO DEFENDANT KHOSTOVAN, ALI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-29-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KHOSTOVAN, ALI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,893.00 FILED BY OLSSON, TED OLSSON, ASTRID AS TO DEFENDANT KHOSTOVAN, ALI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-04-2011. PARTIES PRESENT, MATTER WAS HEARD, ARGUED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBIT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLSSON, TED OLSSON, ASTRID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KHOSTOVAN, ALI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2011 - JUDGMENT.
